title: Message2Me
lyrics: *I'm sending this message to myself, yeah* *I hope I see you in a time, you hear me?* Hear me, it goes for this If your old patterns call your name Pause, Pause, yeah Be real love or not the same Pause Pah, Pah, yeah Put the bone and get your kiss at yourself with certain best You can kind of best the kiss on its answer, rest Then proceed with your best [Music] I'll insight their minds to make them never leave Choose all this be peace Tested to myself with your actions, that's a promise to just be No mask and no And no disguise, no money belated hard Too quiet, you're on my message to myself If love is meant to be, it'll stain No coars are necessary *Inaudible* And say what's underneath Don't do your panic and depression when you speak Don't kiss the loyalty because you think you're deep If you love a simple, honest and complete Don't say what they want Just to gain Control I messaged myself down, but the ones you need, planned and out Never, never make them wanna stay, leave control, everything, and And where does it leave? You got two messages to myself No more masks, no disguise Don't manipulate a heart just pull your own doctor's I used to be using like a room filled up with smoke, have truth, conversation and the most broken brain of being left, I treated love like a rope, tied my grip into the whole thing choked. (I'm not a fucking joke) Hold them back and clutch Electrical continue winning not a crutch It they set up a boundary on her Every line these messages to myself Love is meant It will stay without coercion Yeah, messages till I stop Remember what is real Pure as kind of love You never had to steal away, steal away from you You'll never have to beg them a stick Or beg them to know you are Who you say, take a stand up a You can't up-taken a blind message yourself, don't accept anything less. Message to myself. These are all have truths in this perspective. *Incoherent* Hello? Oh... No, no, I swear I wasn't messaging myself... I'll never do it again! Okay... This... This... This... This... This... >>
